label: ArcGIS Configurator
info: Shared UI, proxy APIs, config & TAK settings persistence. Configs stored in global context so per-feed engine tabs can read them.

name: Migrate flow->global
Configurator HTML
template:
Vector -> TAK Configurator

ArcGISFAA TFR
TAK Server Settings

TLS (admin cert): After Update Now, this server mounts TAK certs at /certs/ inside Node-RED. Open the Node-RED editor (not this page) → TAK Mission API TLS → use /certs/admin.pem and /certs/admin.key if not already filled → enter the private key passphrase → Deploy. Then return here to configure ArcGIS or TFR feeds and save.

Saved Configurations

What are you configuring?

1. Feature Service URL

2. Select Layer(s)

3. Field Mapping

(none selected — falls back to row index)

3b. Source Filter

3c. Class Mapping optional

Assign different icons and colors per feature class. Pick a class field (e.g. type, category) to load distinct values, then customize each. Leave empty for uniform styling.

Select Icon

4. Shape Style, Remarks & TTL

Point geometry — pick an icon for all markers, or use Step 3c class mapping for per-class icons.

Remarks will show as: FieldA: value | FieldB: value
Use 0 for no time filter and default CoT stale (1h).

5. TAK Integration & Save

Uses admin cert for streaming & Mission API (port 8089)
Uncheck only if this mission also contains items from other feeds or manual operator adds.

1. TFR Filter

Ctrl/Cmd+click to select multiple. Includes AS, GU, MP, PR, VI, and USA (national).
Only include TFRs whose center point falls within this radius. Applied after state filter.

2. Style & TAK Integration

The full NOTAM is always in remarks. The callsign is what ATAK shows on the map; it is not the entire NOTAM unless you pick a NOTAM-based option (can be long).
